T001.did: Added the complexityFastPath key to the ConfigKeys object in constants.ts.

T002.did: Added the speckit.companion.complexityFastPath boolean setting (default false — opt-in beta, window scope) to package.json contributes.configuration.

T004.did: Added a --substep flag to write-context.py and threaded it through update_context start/complete entries with (step, substep)-aware idempotency; verified the four fold calls produce a clean ready-to-implement state and re-run idempotently.

T003.did: Added the classify step (fastPathEnabled/projectedFiles/projectedTasks/scopeSignal → simple|normal verdict, errs toward normal) to the turbo specify command body.

T005.did: Added the simple/minimal-mode branch — appends Approach + Implementation Tasks to spec.md, keeps the checklist, and emits no separate plan.md/tasks.md.

T006.did: Added the lifecycle fold (plan start/complete, tasks start/complete, all --substep fast-path, final --status ready-to-implement) after the specify completion in the simple branch.

T007.did: Added the normal branch — writes spec.md only with no fold so the existing full pipeline continues unchanged.

T008.did: Added the guardrail warning (>5 files / >10 tasks / scopeSignal larger emits the verbatim line then runs normal; exactly-at-threshold does not warn).

T011.did: Synced the full classify + simple + normal + guardrail + fold block into the companion-turbo preset parity copy; verified the two command bodies are byte-for-byte identical past the frontmatter.

T009.did: Implemented readComplexityFastPath / writeComplexityFastPath / resolveComplexityFastPath (VS Code setting is the single source of truth, default false, mirrored into companion.yml — no project-level override) and wired the resolve into extension activation plus a setting-change mirror.

T010.did: Added Jest tests covering the four-row truth table, the mirror write, sibling-key preservation, non-boolean rejection, and writer round-trip; the suite passes (29 tests) and tsc is clean.

T012.did: Added a Complexity fast-path (turbo only) section to docs/template-profiles.md documenting the classify decision, simple/normal branches, combined-artifact shape, guardrail warning, and the opt-in mirror model (setting is the source of truth).

T013.did: Added a Complexity Fast-Path Configuration subsection to the root README and a user-facing Added entry to the root CHANGELOG (no internal symbol names).

T014.did: Added a Complexity fast-path (turbo) subsection to the spec-kit README and an Added entry to the spec-kit CHANGELOG; left the extension.yml version to the publish flow.

T015.did: Added a _fastpath check to the eval — asserts folded plan/tasks start+complete substep=fast-path entries, real timestamps, and ready-to-implement landing; silent on a normal spec. Verified against a fold fixture and a non-fold spec.

T016.did: Validated the deterministic quickstart scenarios — eval fast-path checks pass, fold mechanics produce ready-to-implement idempotently, mirror truth table green, parity + full suite (894 tests) pass; scenarios 1–4 AI-prompt behavior matches the contracts.
